Event: Dark Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/12/2021
Sage Bot Item Code: A48


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Forbidden Artifact

Triggers: Once in a while

The fighter summons a golem. The golem's power is directly proportional to this number of corpses on the battlefield. The golem has an attack strength of 20000 and 100000 health. For each corpse on the battlefield, the golem has its damage enhanced by 2000 and its health increased by 8000. Once in a while when a fighter is killed, the golem has 28000health restored.

Requirements: 90-100
